steps.title: Write the nitrogen amount
steps.content: Each kilogram contains $500$ milligrams of nitrogen. For $x$ kilograms, the total nitrogen is $500x$ milligrams.

steps.title: Set the total
steps.content: The sample contains $1{,}500$ milligrams total, so $500x=1{,}500$.

steps.title: Check the units
steps.content: The units confirm the setup: $500$ milligrams per kilogram times $x$ kilograms gives milligrams. That product must equal the total amount, $1{,}500$ milligrams.
